_purpose: Hub project registry - tracks wheels connected to this hub

metadata.description: Auto-managed registry of wheels taught by this hub

wheels._template: Example wheel entry - delete this after first use

teaching_history._template: Teaching event - auto-created by teach command

attention_needed._description: Spokes requiring attention (pending contributions, version lag, etc.)

_instructions.for_teach_command: Add wheel entries when teaching a spoke. Auto-update on each teach.
_instructions.for_hub_ai: Read this to understand which wheels are connected and their teaching history.
_instructions.manual_editing: Safe to edit wheel_id, path, and status. Do not edit metadata or timestamps.
